Name: MX Battery
Author: FedeltaMedia

Actions.Name: MX Master 3S Battery
Actions.Tooltip: Displays the battery percentage of the Logitech MX Master 3S mouse.

Actions.Name: MX Keys S Battery
Actions.Tooltip: Displays the battery percentage of the Logitech MX Keys S keyboard.

Description: Displays the battery percentage of the Logitech MX Master 3S mouse and MX Keys S keyboard connected via a Logi Bolt receiver.
